base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of toad_poseset — a character (playable) from 1988 super mario bros 2. Toad — mushroom-cap NPC-made-playable. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Toad — mushroom-cap NPC-made-playable; fastest speed + best lift-strength but low-jump
